title: Quoted replies inside bubbles, icon-only action buttons, remove extra character counter

requirements.summary: Move quoted reply previews inside the chat bubble so they appear as part of the message bubble content
acceptanceCriteria: Quoted reply context renders inside the chat bubble container, visually contained within the bubble's background/border
Quoted reply appears above the message text within the same bubble
No style changes to colors, fonts, spacing, or bubble shape

file_operations.description: Move the ReplyPreview component rendering from outside the bubble container to inside it, positioning it above the message content. The reply preview should be rendered as the first child within the message bubble's main container, before the message text. Ensure the reply preview remains clickable and visually distinct while staying within the bubble's background and borders. Do not modify any colors, fonts, spacing values, border radii, or other styling properties.

requirements.summary: Make message action buttons always visible and icon-only without text labels
acceptanceCriteria: Action buttons are visible at all times on every message bubble, not only on hover
Action buttons show only icons — no text labels beside or below them
All existing action button icons remain unchanged
No other style or layout changes are made

file_operations.description: Remove any hover-based conditional visibility logic for action buttons (reply, react, pin, report). Ensure action buttons are always rendered and visible. Remove all text labels from action button elements, keeping only the icon elements. Do not modify button icons, colors, or other styling. The buttons should remain functional with their existing click handlers.

requirements.summary: Remove the character counter displayed below the chat input field while keeping the circular counter inside intact
acceptanceCriteria: No character count text or indicator appears below the chat input field
The circular progress/counter indicator inside the chat input field is still present and functional
No other changes to the chat input layout or styling

file_operations.description: Remove the character counter element that is rendered below the chat input field. Do not remove or modify the circular progress indicator that is rendered inside the input field itself. Ensure the input field layout and all other functionality (image upload, GIF search, voice recording, URL detection) remain unchanged.
